gaming.descriptor: high-energy composition with bold foreground subjects scaled large against vivid mid-ground scenes, saturated complementary color palettes favoring teals, magentas, electric purples, and neon greens, dramatic rim lighting and glowing particle effects creating depth, shallow depth-of-field blurring background elements while keeping central subjects crisp and hyper-detailed, dynamic diagonal layouts with overlapping layered elements, glossy and chromatic material rendering on objects, exaggerated expressive character poses conveying shock or excitement, strong contrast between dark atmospheric backgrounds and bright luminous focal points, comic-book energy with clean graphic edges, polished semi-realistic to stylized anime aesthetic, cinematic vignetting at frame borders

magazine.descriptor: cinematic editorial framing, subjects centered or slightly off-center against clean or dramatically lit backgrounds, high production value, polished color grading with rich saturated hues or deliberate monochromatic tones, strong contrast between foreground subjects and depth-blurred or stylized backdrops, professional studio-quality lighting with directional key lights and atmospheric fill, intimate yet commanding subject presence, shallow depth of field emphasizing faces or group formations, cool-to-warm color temperature shifts, glossy magazine-cover aesthetic, tight crop ratios that feel intentional and composed, bold visual hierarchy between subject and environment, moody yet accessible atmosphere
